summary: 3rd dispatch, SAME bug post server-restart (PID 50470->22494). lsof proof: server opens BOTH main .collab/todos.db (fd33, HAS todo) and empty worktrees/backend-2/.collab/todos.db (fd65, 0 todos) and reads the worktree one for project=worktree. Restart did NOT fix resolution. Worker cannot read/complete from a worktree cwd; fix is server-side (map worktree -> tracking project DB).
